sonarqube_apis.name: List Pull Requests
sonarqube_apis.auth: Basic — token as username, empty password
sonarqube_apis.used_for: Fetching all pull requests for a project
sonarqube_apis.notes: Returns array of PR objects with key, title, branch, status.qualityGateStatus, analysisDate

sonarqube_apis.name: Search Issues

params.pullRequest: PR key to scope issues to a specific pull request

sonarqube_apis.auth: Basic — token as username, empty password
sonarqube_apis.used_for: Fetching issues for a pull request with pagination
sonarqube_apis.notes: Extension handles both pagination formats automatically

sonarqube_apis.name: Do Issue Transition
sonarqube_apis.auth: Basic — token as username, empty password
sonarqube_apis.used_for: Marking an issue as resolved in SonarQube

sonarqube_apis.name: List Project Branches
sonarqube_apis.auth: Basic — token as username, empty password
sonarqube_apis.used_for: Listing branches (available but not yet surfaced in UI)
sonarqube_apis.notes: Silently returns [] on error — some SonarQube editions do not expose this endpoint

sonarqube_apis.name: System Ping
sonarqube_apis.auth: Basic — token as username, empty password
sonarqube_apis.notes: Returns plain text 'pong'. Some SonarCloud configurations may return 404 — extension treats any non-error response as a successful connection
